📧 Visitor Follow-up Agent

Enter visitor information and let AI create a personalized 6-week follow-up sequence.

Visitor Information

What You'll Get

  • 1
    Welcome Email
    Sent immediately
  • 2
    Check-in
    Ask about experience
  • 3
    Community Story
    Share about groups
  • 4
    Event Invite
    Invite to service/event
  • 5
    Testimony
    Share community story
  • 6
    Personal Invite
    Encourage connection
